task_objective: Address code review findings for settings queue timeouts, stylesheet wildcards, and redundant concurrent initializations.
design_decisions: Implemented sequence-guarded late promise resolution callback verification (.then checks) inside settings queue updates to reconcile timed out backend states. Refactored wildcard style selector rule in dropdownStyleEl to list targeted element types explicitly. Tracked in-flight initialization and metadata promises via module-scoped variables to reuse promises and prevent parallel fetches.
results: All checks passed, ruff check and format passed, ty check passed, typecheck and rollup build succeeded, tests pass cleanly (388/388).
